title: In recognition of May as Mental Health Awareness Month, Camilla, GA Mayor Pro-Tem DeWayne Burley (left) presented a proclamation to Georgia Pines Chief Clinical Officer Nicole Cromer (middle) and DBHDD Region 4 Disability Benefits Specialist Mary Ross (right).
post: In recognition of May as Mental Health Awareness Month, Camilla, GA Mayor Pro-Tem DeWayne Burley (left) presented a proclamation to Georgia Pines Chief Clinical Officer Nicole Cromer (middle) and DBHDD Region 4 Disability Benefits Specialist Mary Ross (right).
